message:
fix: correct policy pattern matching, guard against NaN loss, and tolerate plugin BrokenPipe

Policy pattern matching (policy.rs):
- Fix regex/glob fallback to use the stripped pattern (without anchors
  and wildcards) for contains() checks, instead of the original pattern.

NaN/Inf guard (expected_loss.rs):
- After computing weighted expected loss, check for NaN/Inf and return
  InvalidPosterior error instead of silently propagating garbage values.

Plugin subprocess (manager.rs):
- Tolerate BrokenPipe errors when writing to plugin stdin (plugin exited
  early without reading input) instead of failing the entire invocation.

Also includes minor dead-code removal and formatting fixes in robust.rs,
prechecks.rs, ancestry.rs, user_intent.rs, and writer.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
